elements.title: lang::report_page_057_title::local_kopere_bi
elements.commandsql:
SELECT kbi_cm.id, kbi_m.name AS moduletype, kbi_cm.added, kbi_cm.completion, kbi_c.fullname, cmc.num_compl AS completed, grd.grade
FROM mdl_course_modules kbi_cm
       JOIN mdl_modules kbi_m ON kbi_m.id = kbi_cm.module
       JOIN mdl_course kbi_c ON kbi_c.id = kbi_cm.course
       LEFT JOIN (SELECT coursemoduleid, COUNT(id) AS num_compl
                  FROM mdl_course_modules_completion
                  WHERE id > 0
                    AND completionstate IN (1, 2)
                  GROUP BY coursemoduleid) cmc ON cmc.coursemoduleid = kbi_cm.id
       LEFT JOIN (SELECT kbi_gi.iteminstance,
                         kbi_gi.itemmodule,
                         ROUND(AVG(CASE
                                     WHEN kbi_g.rawgrademax > 0 THEN (kbi_g.finalgrade / kbi_g.rawgrademax) * 100
                                     ELSE kbi_g.finalgrade END), 0) AS grade
                  FROM mdl_grade_items kbi_gi
                         JOIN mdl_grade_grades kbi_g ON kbi_g.itemid = kbi_gi.id AND kbi_g.finalgrade IS NOT NULL
                  WHERE kbi_gi.itemtype = 'mod'
                  GROUP BY kbi_gi.iteminstance, kbi_gi.itemmodule) grd
         ON grd.itemmodule = kbi_m.name AND grd.iteminstance = kbi_cm.instance
WHERE kbi_cm.id > 0
  AND kbi_cm.visible = 1
  AND kbi_cm.course = :courseid
